reviews.comment:
Lugar maravilloso para hacer un alto de vuelta a CABA, baños excepcionales,mesas y bancos bajo Arboleda.Lugar maravilloso para marear y relajarse antes de seguir.

(Translated by Google)
A wonderful place to stop on the way back to Buenos Aires, with exceptional restrooms, tables and benches under a tree-lined path. A wonderful place to unwind and relax before continuing.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURodXFtazR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
MUY BUENA ATENCION DE LOS EMPLEADOS EN GENERAL , LO MALO , ES QUE NO ESTA  BIEN SEÑALIZADO, LO DE TENER QUE HACER COLA  PARA CARGAR COMBUSTIBLE , EL CARTELITO,  ESTA MUY BAJO Y PERDIDO ,   ,  ENTRE A CARGAR Y ME AVISARON QUE TENIA QUE HACER COLA AFUERA, Y DE AHI QUE VOLVI A SALIR A DAR LA VUELTA MANZANA YA TENIA TRES MAS ADELANTE

(Translated by Google)
The staff were generally very helpful. The only downside is the poor signage indicating the fuel line. The sign is very low and hard to spot. I went inside to fill up and was told I had to queue outside, so I went back outside to walk around the block. There were already three more stations ahead.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSNUpHSzhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Unos de los playeros atendió a personas que vieron después que nosotros cuando se supone que es por orden de llegada.
No solo eso sino que fue arrogante y mal educado !
( Uno que tenía chivita 😒 )

(Translated by Google)
One of the beach attendants served people who arrived after us, even though it's supposed to be on a first-come, first-served basis.

Not only that, but he was arrogant and rude!

(One of them had a goatee 😒)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoM2JYbmdnRRAB
